## Checklist

- [ ] No live run artifacts are committed.
- [ ] Reusable kit files remain separate from run-specific writable files.
- [ ] Related README or index links are still accurate.
- [ ] English and Japanese front-door guidance are aligned where both are present.
- [ ] Topology still treats Arm and Finger names as identifiers, not fixed roles.
- [ ] Handoff, verification, and sign-off expectations remain explicit.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` is updated when the change affects public kit behavior.
